# env-dashboard-site

**Generated — do not edit by hand.**

This public repo exists only to serve the SunCentral environment dashboard via
GitHub Pages (Pages requires a public repo on the Free plan). Its `index.html`
is **StatiCrypt-encrypted ciphertext** — useless without the shared passphrase —
overwritten on every deploy by the build workflow in the private
[`env-dashboard`](https://github.com/pivot-energy/env-dashboard) repo.

**Page:** https://pivot-energy.github.io/env-dashboard-site/

Source code, the render script, and all credentials live in the private repo.
